record.field:
version: '2' services: db: image: postgres:{{POSTGRES-VERSION}} user: root environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo13: image: odoo:{{ODOO-VERSION}} user: root depends_on: - db ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:8069" - "{{LONGPOLLING-PORT}}:8072" tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always

version: '2' services: db: image: postgres:{{POSTGRES-VERSION}} user: root environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo14: image: odoo:{{ODOO-VERSION}} user: root depends_on: - db ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:8069" - "{{LONGPOLLING-PORT}}:8072" tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always

version: '2' services: db: image: postgres:{{POSTGRES-VERSION}} user: root environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo15: image: odoo:{{ODOO-VERSION}} user: root depends_on: - db ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:8069" - "{{LONGPOLLING-PORT}}:8072" tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always

version: '2' services: db: image: postgres:{{POSTGRES-VERSION}} user: root environment: - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=odoo - POSTGRES_USER=odoo - POSTGRES_DB=postgres restart: always volumes: - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data
odoo19: image: odoo:{{ODOO-VERSION}} user: root depends_on: - db tty: true command: -- environment: - HOST=db - USER=odoo - PASSWORD=odoo volumes: - ./addons:/mnt/extra-addons - ./etc:/etc/odoo - ./data:/var/lib/odoo restart: always expose: - "8069" - "8072"
nginx: image: nginx:latest depends_on: - odoo19 ports: - "{{HTTP-PORT}}:80" restart: always command: /bin/bash -c "echo 'events { worker_connections 1024; } http { upstream odoo { server odoo19:8069; } upstream odoochat { server odoo19:8072; } server { listen 80; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $$host; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $$proxy_add_x_forwarded_for; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $$scheme; proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $$remote_addr; location /websocket { proxy_pass http://odoochat; proxy_set_header Upgrade $$http_upgrade; proxy_set_header Connection \"upgrade\"; } location / { proxy_pass http://odoo; } } }' > /etc/nginx/nginx.conf && nginx -g 'daemon off;'"
[options] addons_path = /mnt/extra-addons admin_passwd = admin data_dir = /var/lib/odoo logfile = /var/log/odoo/odoo.log proxy_mode = True workers = 2 max_cron_threads = 1
